chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl.B.A.No.S-192 of 2023 (Jigar alias Jigo and another Vs. The State.) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of bail application. 11.05.2023. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Jatoi, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- IRSHAD ALI SHAH, J.- It is alleged that the applicants robbed complainant Mst.Samina of her gold ring, for that the present case was registered. On having been refused pre-arrest bail by learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Mehar, the applicants have sought for the same from this Court by way of instant application u/s. 498 Cr.PC. 2. Heard arguments and perused the record. 3. The FIR of the incident has been lodged with delay of more months that too after having recourse under Section 22-A/B Cr.PC; such delay could not be ignored. The offence alleged against the applicants is not falling within prohibitory clause. The parties being neighborers are said to be disputed over kids fight. The case has finally been challaned. The applicants have joined the trial and there is no allegation of misusing the concession of interim pre-arrest bail on their part. In these circumstances, a case for grant of pre-arrest bail to the applicants on point of further inquiry and malafide is made out. 4. In view of above, the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicants is confirmed on same terms and conditions. 5. The instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
